title: cymbopogon ariani
intro: Cymbopogon ariani, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, native to the tropical forests of South Asia. It possesses antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it a valuable plant for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Cymbopogon ariani include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating symptoms of fever, and supporting digestive health. The essential oil extracted from its leaves is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
